thesis: MCX shows the strongest momentum in the universe alongside rising analyst revisions; a commodity-derivatives volume upcycle and product launches drive a high-margin, asset-light earnings ramp.
falsification: Momentum z collapses toward zero or revisions roll over, or monthly traded-volume growth stalls for two consecutive months.

thesis: BSE compounds on derivatives/option volume share gains with strong momentum and rising revisions; operating leverage on a fixed cost base lifts margins.
falsification: Derivatives volume share reverses or revisions turn down, or momentum z falls below 1.

thesis: Karnataka Bank is simultaneously cheap on earnings/book, trending, and being upgraded — a re-rating candidate as ROA normalizes; multi-signal confirmation lowers single-factor risk.
falsification: Asset-quality slippage (rising GNPA/credit cost) or revisions fade, removing the upgrade leg of the thesis.

thesis: Bank of Maharashtra retains strong relative momentum and reasonable valuation; PSU re-rating intact but revision support is moderate, so I size it large yet trimmed from 5.2%.
falsification: Momentum z drops below 1 or deposit-growth/margin pressure forces estimate downgrades.

thesis: PNB Housing keeps positive momentum and firming revisions as it re-accelerates retail housing AUM with improving asset quality.
falsification: Revisions turn negative or AUM growth/spreads compress, breaking the re-acceleration thesis.

thesis: IndusInd is recovering with rising revisions, improving momentum and value support; stabilization in microfinance/credit cost drives a re-rating off a low base.
falsification: Renewed asset-quality shock or governance concern, or revisions reverse down.

thesis: Groww (Billionbrains) compounds on retail platform user/revenue growth with firming revisions and good momentum.
falsification: Active-client or revenue growth decelerates, or regulatory tightening on broking economics; revisions roll over.

thesis: Karur Vysya delivers consistent ROA improvement with positive momentum; a steady south-India private bank compounder.
falsification: ROA stalls or credit cost rises, and momentum fades below zero.

thesis: ICICI Bank is the highest-quality large private bank; held modest as low-beta ballast even though momentum is muted.
falsification: Material NIM compression or asset-quality deterioration relative to peers.

thesis: Muthoot benefits from a buoyant gold-loan environment with strongly rising revisions, offsetting soft short-term price momentum.
falsification: Gold-loan growth or yields compress, or revisions reverse despite the gold backdrop.

thesis: City Union Bank is being upgraded as growth and ROA recover; rising revisions lead the still-soft price momentum.
falsification: Loan-growth recovery stalls or revisions fade, leaving only weak momentum.

thesis: Axis is a quality large private bank held as ballast; mildly positive revisions, fair value, low incremental risk.
falsification: Deposit-cost pressure or asset-quality slippage drives estimate downgrades.

thesis: SBI provides cheap, liquid PSU-bank ballast with healthy balance-sheet and steady earnings; not a momentum bet, a stabilizer.
falsification: Credit cost spikes or PSU-bank de-rating; valuation support breaks.

thesis: AU SFB has firming revisions and a strong franchise; rich valuation caps upside so I keep a moderate weight.
falsification: Revisions reverse or growth disappoints against its premium multiple.

thesis: Home First keeps rising revisions on high-teens AUM growth in affordable housing with controlled credit cost.
falsification: AUM growth slows or asset quality deteriorates; revisions turn down.

thesis: Star Health rides structural health-insurance penetration; combined-ratio improvement supports a re-rating.
falsification: Loss ratio deteriorates or growth slows, and revisions weaken.

thesis: Piramal Finance's shift to a granular retail book is being rewarded with strongly rising revisions and positive momentum as legacy wholesale drags fade.
falsification: Wholesale-book provisioning resurfaces or retail growth stalls; revisions reverse.

thesis: Manappuram is being upgraded as gold-loan momentum and microfinance stabilization improve the earnings trajectory.
falsification: Microfinance stress re-accelerates or gold-loan yields fall; revisions roll over.

thesis: Bandhan shows reviving momentum and firming revisions as asset quality stabilizes and the deposit franchise broadens beyond microfinance.
falsification: Microfinance credit cost spikes again or revisions fade, breaking the turnaround.

thesis: Angel One compounds on retail-broking client and volume growth with strong momentum and rising revisions.
falsification: Regulatory hit to broking economics or volumes decline; momentum and revisions both fade.

thesis: Shriram Finance retains positive momentum and a strong CV/retail-NBFC franchise, but softening revisions argue for a trimmed weight, not a build.
falsification: Revisions deteriorate further or CV-cycle/asset-quality weakens; momentum turns negative.

thesis: Niva Bupa is a revision-led structural grower in standalone health insurance with strong upgrades; momentum should follow the earnings ramp.
falsification: Loss ratio worsens or premium growth disappoints; revisions stall.

thesis: Equitas SFB carries the strongest revisions in the small-finance-bank cohort as credit cost normalizes and ROA recovers.
falsification: Microfinance stress persists or ROA recovery stalls; revisions reverse.

thesis: Canara HSBC Life is a revision-led structural grower scaling its bancassurance-led life franchise.
falsification: VNB margin or premium growth disappoints; revisions fade.

thesis: Ujjivan SFB holds modest positive revisions and recovering fundamentals; kept at a reduced weight within a diversified SFB sleeve.
falsification: Asset quality deteriorates or revisions turn negative.

thesis: Kotak is a high-quality, low-beta large bank held as small ballast; muted momentum keeps it underweight versus its index size.
falsification: NIM/loan-growth disappointment or further de-rating.

thesis: SBI Life remains a best-in-class life insurer but with soft near-term momentum and revisions, so I hold a reduced core weight.
falsification: VNB margin compresses materially or revisions worsen.

thesis: ICICI Lombard is a quality general insurer with pricing discipline; held as a small structural core despite muted momentum.
falsification: Combined ratio deteriorates or growth/revisions weaken.

thesis: PB Fintech compounds on insurance-distribution and new initiatives with positive revisions; rich valuation argues for a trimmed weight.
falsification: Take-rate or growth disappoints, or path-to-profit slips; revisions reverse.

thesis: CreditAccess Grameen carries strong rising revisions as microfinance credit cost peaks and ROA recovers; a revision-led recovery bet.
falsification: Microfinance stress re-accelerates or revisions reverse, before momentum confirms.

thesis: Poonawalla Fincorp shows strongly rising revisions on a growth re-acceleration and new product build-out; a small revision-led position ahead of momentum.
falsification: Credit cost from new unsecured products spikes or growth disappoints; revisions fade.
